steps.title: Use the contrast with improvising
steps.content: The passage says Marzan often does not know what the final product will look like and instead makes up designs as he weaves. The blank must describe a specific plan he lacks before beginning.

steps.title: Reject unrelated nouns
steps.content: Choice B means admiration, an emotion rather than a plan. Choice C means copying something, not planning the final product. Choice D means acceptance, which does not contrast with improvising designs. The answer is A.
